API key is set\nChange with %1api YOUR_A:
API key is set
Change with %1api YOUR_API_KEY
Available commands are:\n- %1api API_KEY:
Available commands are:
- %1api API_KEY: Set API key for current service
- %1service SERVICE: Change wallpaper service
- %1similar IMAGE_ID: Find similar images, you must enter wallhaven image id thats located in the file name (e.g. wallhaven-lyz3d2.png's id is lyz3d2)
- %1anime SHOW/HIDE: Toggle anime results (only for wallhaven service)
- %1sort SORT_OPTION: Sort results
- %1clear: Clear the current list of images
- %1next: Load next page
Shows a list of available commands: Shows a list of available commands
Wallpapers | Advanced search with ratios: Wallpapers | Advanced search with ratios, resolutions, categories, sorting
